name: Spotify Web API (Catalog)
description: Spotify Web API — public catalog access (search, single track/album/artist metadata) using an app token via the client_credentials grant. No user consent required: the daemon obtains and auto-refreshes the short-lived (1h) Bearer access token from your client credentials. Set SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET. NOTE (Feb-2026 Web API update): for Development-Mode apps the batch catalog endpoints (GET /tracks?ids=, /albums?ids=, /artists?ids=, etc.) and browse endpoints were removed, and /search 'limit' is capped at 10 — single-item fetches (GET /tracks/{id}, /albums/{id}, ...) and /search still work. Extended-Quota apps are unaffected. The allowlist stays broad (api.spotify.com/**) but plan around these limits if your app is in Development mode.

testConnection.description: Runs a minimal catalog search to verify the app token
